summary: Iteration 204 testing complete. All 6 backend regression tests passed (100%). All 11 frontend features verified. Glassmorphism fix applied to MissionControl.js (backdrop opacity 0.35 with blur(20px), panel bg 0.72 with blur(24px)). Atmospheric audio cues added to OrbitalHub.js (ZONE_AUDIO map with frequencies for each satellite zone). All satellites render and are clickable. ENLIGHTEN.MINT.CAFE opens/closes correctly. Observatory page loads with 3 tabs. OrbCorner visible on non-hub pages.

OrbitalHub.js: ZONE_AUDIO object maps 13 satellites to audio zones (celestial/earth/heart/creative) - PASS
OrbitalHub.js: useAtmosphericAudio hook creates WebAudio oscillators with soft fade in/out - PASS

OrbitalHub.js: All 13 satellites render with data-testid='satellite-{id}' - PASS
OrbitalHub.js: Central orb click opens ENLIGHTEN.MINT.CAFE - PASS
OrbitalHub.js: Satellite click navigates to correct page - PASS
Observatory.js: Page loads with 3 tabs (orrery, stars, events) - PASS

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 204 glassmorphism and atmospheric audio features fully working. (1) MissionControl.js: Backdrop uses rgba(0,0,0,0.35) with blur(20px) - cosmic scenery visible through overlay. Panel uses rgba(10,10,18,0.72) with blur(24px). (2) OrbitalHub.js: ZONE_AUDIO maps each satellite to a zone with specific frequency - celestial zone (star-chart=852Hz, observatory=963Hz, oracle=741Hz), earth zone (workshop=256Hz, trade=324Hz, games=396Hz, map=285Hz), heart zone (mood=528Hz, breathing=432Hz, meditation=639Hz, journal=396Hz), creative zone (mixer=369Hz, theory=417Hz). useAtmosphericAudio hook plays oscillator on hover with soft fade. Tooltip shows '{hz}Hz · {zone}' format. (3) All 13 satellites clickable and navigate correctly. (4) ENLIGHTEN.MINT.CAFE close button works. (5) Observatory page has 3 tabs. (6) OrbCorner visible on non-hub pages. (7) Backend regression: GET /api/observatory/planets, GET /api/mastery/tier, GET /api/workshop/platonic-solids all pass.
